Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 215

ENSP250 Lawns in the Landscape: Environmental Hero or Villain? (3 Credits)

Examination of the lawn as an element in the anthropogenic landscape and its influence on global warming, regional air and water quality, ecological diversity, mammalian pesticide exposure and consumptive water use. Demographic and socioeconomic factors are examined in the context of being predictors of landscape aesthetic desires and lawn management behaviors. Policies that incentivize lawn alternatives or changes in lawn management behavior are discussed.Cross-listed with PLSC250.

Credit Only Granted for. ENSP250 or PLSC250.
